ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repeaters" (
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repeater */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the repeater */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the repeater */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current operational status of the repeater */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Time of the last status update */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the repeater node */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* The frequency range the repeater operates on */,
  "power_output" REAL /* The power output of the repeater in watts */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date the repeater was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repeater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* The elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the location */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the accessibility of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the operational status */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node's function */,
  "last_status_update" TEXT /* The last time the node's status was updated */,
  "status" INTEGER /* The current status of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* The date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the technician */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* The date of the last training the technician completed */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* The number of years of experience the technician has */,
  "availability" TEXT /* The availability status of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_areas" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage area */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater with this coverage */,
  "area_description" TEXT /* Description of the coverage area */,
  "effective_range" REAL /* Effective range of the repeater in kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* The population density in the coverage area */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* The type of terrain in the coverage area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_areas_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_reports" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue report */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater with the reported issue */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES permissions ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage */,
  "transmissions" INTEGER /* Number of transmissions on that date */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of use in hours */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* The number of unique users who used the repeater on the given date */,
  "busy_hours" TEXT /* The hours of the day when the repeater was most used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_stats_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission set */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permissions */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted by the permissions */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the permission level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater the equipment is associated with */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., transmitter, antenna) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* The manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* The date when the warranty for the equipment expires */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date when the next inspection is due */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the manufacturer */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* The year the manufacturer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater running this software version */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the software version was released */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in the software version */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Information about the compatibility of the software version with different hardware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_versions_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)
